events.message: You hurl Smoke Bomb. Enemies lose pursuit tracking for 3 turns.
Green Slime loses your trail in the smoke.

steps.render:
Seven Floors to Dawn v002
Seed: seed_005 | Floor: 1/2 | Turn: 0/100
Status: ACTIVE | HP: 20/20
Outcome: ACTIVE - Run in progress.
Objective: Use Smoke Bombs to break pursuit, then reach the dawn stairs.
Opening: The Dawn Bell tolls above Seven Floors. Descend, recover it, and escape before sunrise seals the paths.
#########
#########
#####...#
####....#
####..@.#
##....###
##s...###
##>.!.###
#########
Inventory: Smoke Bomb
  - ~ Smoke Bomb: Enemies lose pursuit tracking for a few turns.
Visible items: ! Healing Potion: Restores a modest amount of HP when used from inventory.
Tactical: none active.
Legend: @ You, K Keeper, s Slime, b Bat, S Shell, t Thief, g Ghost, ! Potion, ~ Smoke, % Swap, * Fire, ^ Warp, > Stairs, # Wall, . Floor
Log:
- The Dawn Bell tolls above Seven Floors. Descend, recover it, and escape before sunrise seals the paths.
- Smoke Bomb starts in your pack: use it when enemies close in to break pursuit.
- Legend reminder: ~ marks Smoke Bombs, ! marks Healing Potions, > marks stairs.
